title: Software Engineer - Python (Remote)
description:
**Note: We are open to Individuals who reside in India for this position.**
**About The Role**
 We are looking for a Python Backend Engineer to join our team in India. In this role, you will be the bridge between our data science models and our production applications. Your mission is to build, scale, and maintain the high\\-performance APIs that power our industry\\-leading revenue management tools.
   

  

 While PriceLabs is known for its world\\-class visualizations, this role focuses on the engine under the hood: designing robust data contracts, optimizing query performance, and ensuring our distributed systems can handle the massive scale of our global property data.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* API Development: Design and maintain high\\-performance REST APIs using Flask or FastAPI to serve data science outputs to front\\-end applications.
* Data Engineering: Utilize Pandas and Polars to manipulate large datasets efficiently and ensure data integrity across the pipeline.
* AI Integration: Design and optimize Generative AI workflows and RAG (Retrieval\\-Augmented Generation) systems to enhance our data products with LLM\\-powered insights.
* Schema \\& Validation: Implement strict data validation and settings management using Pydantic.
* Backend Scaling: Optimize backend systems for latency and throughput, including implementing caching strategies and improving SQL query efficiency.
* Distributed Systems: Contribute to the architecture of our distributed data systems to ensure high availability and reliability.
* Collaboration: Work closely with Data Scientists to productize machine learning models and help the design team understand technical constraints.


**About You**
* Strong understanding of data processing principles, algorithms, and data structures.
* At least 1 year of programming experience in Python. Familiarity and experience with flask/fast api and working knowledge of numpy, pandas/polars are a big plus!
* Strong communication skills, including the ability and willingness to explain complicated ideas in simple terms.
* Comfortable working with basic linux and networking concepts
* Experience with relational databases and strong knowledge of SQL.
* Prior experience working in a fast\\-paced environment.
* Desire to wear many hats.


**Preferred**
* Experience writing product code at a SaaS company


**How to apply for this position?**
 Please fill out the form with the required details. If your profile is shortlisted, our team will reach out to you via email. If you don't find the emails in your inbox, please check your spam folder.
   

  

**About PriceLabs**
 PriceLabs is a revenue management solution for the short\\-term rental and hospitality industry, founded in 2014 and headquartered in Chicago, IL. Our platform helps individual hosts and hospitality professionals optimize their pricing and revenue management, adapting to changing market trends and occupancy levels.
   

  

 With dynamic pricing, automation rules, and customizations, we manage pricing and minimum\\-stay restrictions for any portfolio size, with prices automatically uploaded to preferred channels.
   

  

 Every day, we price over 500,000\\+ listings globally across 150\\+ countries, offering world\\-class tools like the Base Price Help and Minimum Stay Recommendation Engine.
   

  

*In 2025, we scaled to;*
* 500K\\+ properties syncing daily
* 60K\\+ customers worldwide
* 300\\+ globally remote team
* 36% diversity


**Industry Awards Won**
* SaasBoomi 2021
* The Shortyz 2020
* The Shortyz 2023
* STRive Awards 2025


 We continue to grow exponentially backed by a strong team to take us to the next level.
   

  

**Why join PriceLabs?**
* Work with an industry\\-leading product that has thousands of customers worldwide, and our customers love the product! (NPS in the 70s, Customer reviews here)
* Work with a global team (18 countries and counting) of passionate individuals that accept open communication, empowerment, and a shared focus on customer success.
* We are a freemium product, so marketing leads the charge on customer acquisition.
* We are a remote\\-first organization and accept work from home as the norm.


 PriceLabs is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to providing equal opportunity in all aspects of employment. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, colour, religious creed, national origin, ancestry, sex, age, veteran status, marital status or physical challenges.

title: Software Engineer Intern
description:
**About The Company**
 SkillsCapital is a rapidly growing AI\\-first technology platform dedicated to transforming the global talent acquisition landscape. Established with the vision to streamline and enhance the hiring process through cutting\\-edge AI and machine learning solutions, SkillsCapital specializes in providing fully vetted, on\\-demand tech talent and teams across a broad spectrum of enterprise technologies including SAP, Salesforce, Microsoft, Oracle, AI/ML, and Cloud services. Our innovative platform leverages advanced AI\\-powered systems to facilitate smart matching, intelligent screening, vetting engines, and scalable decision\\-making tools, empowering organizations to make informed hiring decisions efficiently.
   

  

 In its inaugural year, SkillsCapital has achieved significant milestones, including establishing a strong product\\-market fit, gaining live customer traction, and building a trusted platform utilized by clients across the U.S., U.K., Europe, and the Middle East. The company is on a trajectory to surpass a $2 million annual revenue mark in the upcoming quarter, operating profitably and bootstrapped. Our growth journey has seen us expand from a team of 1 to 10, then 10 to 20 members, and we are now gearing up for an ambitious expansion from 20 to 100 employees. Our team comprises industry veterans from renowned organizations such as IBM, Accenture, Deloitte, Trilogy, ESW Capital, and academic leaders from institutions like Wharton, IIT Delhi, IIIT Hyderabad, and BITS Pilani.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a passionate and talented Software Engineer Intern specializing in AI/ML to join our dynamic team. This role offers a unique opportunity to work on real\\-world, production\\-grade AI systems that directly impact critical business workflows. As an intern, you will be involved in building and refining AI\\-powered talent matching and ranking systems, semantic scoring models, and search intelligence components. You will collaborate closely with senior architects and engineers, gaining invaluable exposure to end\\-to\\-end development processes, from data pipelines and experimentation to deployment and live system integration.
   

  

 This position is ideal for individuals eager to learn by doing, working on projects that are used by actual clients and contribute to the ongoing evolution of our product offerings. There is also potential for extension into freelance, contract, or full\\-time roles based on your performance and contributions during the internship period.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Final\\-year student or recent graduate in Computer Science, Data Science, AI/ML, or related fields.
* Strong programming skills in Python, with experience in libraries such as scikit\\-learn, Pandas, NumPy, and similar tools.
* Some exposure to Natural Language Processing (NLP), transformers, Large Language Models (LLMs), and frameworks like Hugging Face or LangChain is highly desirable.
* Experience in building, evaluating, and deploying machine learning models in a structured and systematic manner.
* Basic understanding of version control systems like Git and familiarity with MLOps practices is a plus.
* Availability for a 3 to 6\\-month internship, either full\\-time or part\\-time, with a commitment to learning and growth.


**Responsibilities**
* Develop and enhance machine learning models for talent matching, ranking, and semantic scoring to improve system accuracy and efficiency.
* Contribute to building robust data pipelines, conducting experiments, training models, and deploying solutions into production environments.
* Clean, preprocess, and analyze structured and unstructured data sourced from CVs, job descriptions, and other inputs.
* Assist in experimenting with Large Language Model (LLM)\\-based components to enhance search and intelligence capabilities.
* Participate in designing and implementing end\\-to\\-end system architecture, ensuring seamless integration and scalability.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions.
* Document code, processes, and models to maintain clarity and facilitate future enhancements.


**Benefits**
* Competitive stipend based on performance and commitment, rewarding your contributions.
* Hands\\-on experience working on live projects that are deployed in real\\-world scenarios, not just experimental prototypes.
* Mentorship from industry veterans with extensive backgrounds in AI, product development, and technology.
* Flexible remote work environment, allowing you to learn and contribute from anywhere.
* Opportunity for rapid professional growth, with potential pathways to freelance, contractual, or full\\-time employment after the internship.
* Exposure to cutting\\-edge AI/ML technologies and practices, enhancing your technical skill set and industry understanding.


 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 SkillsCapital is committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse work environment. We believe in equal employment opportunities for all applicants and employees regardless of race, gender, age, religion, sexual orientation, disability, or background. We value the unique perspectives each individual brings and are dedicated to creating a workplace where everyone can thrive and contribute to our collective success.

title: Software Engineer - JavaScript
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions. Renowned for its innovative approach, Turing specializes in developing cutting\\-edge AI systems that transform industries and empower organizations worldwide. The company fosters a dynamic and collaborative environment, attracting top talent from across the globe to work on impactful projects that shape the future of technology. With a commitment to excellence and continuous innovation, Turing is at the forefront of AI research and development, making significant contributions to the field and providing opportunities for professionals to grow and excel in their careers.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our dynamic team working on a groundbreaking project focused on Large Language Model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. This role involves engaging directly with high\\-quality, open\\-source GitHub repositories to build verifiable software engineering tasks based on real\\-world repository histories. The primary responsibilities include automating development environments, triaging issues, assessing test coverage and quality, and modifying codebases for performance evaluation. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in software engineering, particularly in working with complex codebases, and will be capable of contributing both technically and strategically to the project. Additionally, there will be opportunities to lead junior engineers, fostering a collaborative and innovative team environment.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a minimum of three years of professional experience in software engineering. Proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript is essential, along with a solid understanding of version control systems such as Git. Experience with containerization tools like Docker and familiarity with setting up software pipelines are also required. Candidates should demonstrate the ability to navigate and understand complex codebases, run and modify projects locally, and evaluate code quality effectively. Prior contributions to open\\-source projects or experience in open\\-source evaluation are considered advantageous. Strong problem\\-solving skills, excellent communication, and a proactive attitude are vital for success in this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage GitHub issues across trending open\\-source libraries to identify challenging tasks for LLMs.
* Set up, configure, and maintain code repositories, including Dockerization and environment setup for testing and development.
* Assess unit test coverage and quality, ensuring the robustness of codebases.
* Modify and run codebases locally to evaluate LLM performance in bug\\-fixing and other software engineering scenarios.
* Collaborate closely with research teams to design and select repositories and issues that test LLM capabilities effectively.
* Lead and mentor junior engineers, fostering a collaborative team environment and ensuring project milestones are met.
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of project workflows, tools, and methodologies to enhance efficiency and output quality.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing offers the opportunity to work remotely in a flexible environment, allowing you to balance work and personal life effectively. You will be part of a forward\\-thinking organization at the forefront of AI research, working on innovative projects that have a significant impact on the future of software development. Turing provides competitive compensation aligned with industry standards and a chance to collaborate with leading AI and software engineering experts worldwide. Additionally, you will have access to continuous learning opportunities, professional development resources, and the chance to contribute to cutting\\-edge AI advancements in a supportive and inclusive workplace.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to fostering an inclusive environment where all employees and applicants are treated with respect and fairness. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe diversity drives innovation and excellence, and we encourage individuals from all backgrounds to apply and join our team. All employment decisions are made based on merit, qualifications, and business needs.

title: Senior Software Enginer
description:
**This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Software Engineer in India.**
 In this role, you will contribute to a critical platform modernization and security initiative, focusing on building robust, secure, and scalable backend systems. You will work primarily with C\\# and .NET technologies to design and enhance APIs, strengthen authentication and authorization flows, and improve overall system reliability within an Azure\\-based ecosystem. The position plays a key role in ensuring data protection, secure integrations, and compliance with modern security standards across distributed services. You will collaborate closely with DevOps, database, and engineering teams to implement best practices in cloud security and system design. This is a high\\-impact engineering role where your work directly improves platform resilience, security posture, and production stability. You will operate in a fast\\-paced, quality\\-driven environment with strong emphasis on engineering excellence and accountability.
   

  

 Accountabilities
   

  

 You will be responsible for designing, developing, and securing backend services and APIs while contributing to the modernization and reliability of a large\\-scale cloud\\-based platform.
   

  

* Design and develop secure backend services and APIs using C\\# and .NET technologies.
* Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms such as OAuth, JWT, SSO, and RBAC.
* Integrate applications with Azure Active Directory (Entra ID) and manage identity flows.
* Remove hardcoded secrets and integrate secure storage using Azure Key Vault.
* Implement audit logging, monitoring, and observability across backend services.
* Define and enforce secure API communication and data protection standards.
* Implement PII masking and secure data handling practices within applications.
* Optimize and secure third\\-party integrations (e.g., Stripe, SendGrid, Twilio).
* Support environment separation, deployment improvements, and release stability.
* Collaborate with DevOps and database teams on security, disaster recovery, and compliance initiatives.
* Participate in debugging, incident resolution, and root cause analysis for production issues.


**Requirements**
 The ideal candidate brings strong backend engineering expertise in .NET development, with a solid focus on security, cloud integration, and scalable system design.
   

  

* 5\\+ years of experience in C\\# / .NET development.
* Strong expertise in ASP.NET Core, Web APIs, and microservices architecture.
* Hands\\-on experience with authentication and authorization frameworks (OAuth, JWT, SSO).
* Proven experience working with Azure services, especially Azure Active Directory (Entra ID).
* Strong understanding of secure coding practices and data protection principles.
* Experience integrating third\\-party APIs such as Stripe, SendGrid, or similar services.
* Familiarity with logging frameworks, monitoring tools, and observability practices.
* Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and cloud deployment processes.
* Strong debugging, analytical, and problem\\-solving skills with good communication ability.
* (Nice to have) Experience with Docker and Kubernetes for containerized environments.


**Benefits**
* Competitive compensation aligned with experience
* Opportunity to work on high\\-impact platform security and modernization initiatives
* Exposure to Azure cloud ecosystem and enterprise\\-scale systems
* Collaborative engineering environment with cross\\-functional teams
* Strong focus on learning, technical growth, and architecture ownership
* Involvement in critical security, compliance, and reliability projects
* Dynamic and quality\\-driven engineering culture


**How Jobgether Works**
 We use an
 **AI\\-powered matching process** 
 to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top\\-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
   

  

 We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
   

  

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

**Data Privacy Notice:** 
 By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre\\-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Qualcomm India Private Limited is a global leader in the technology industry, renowned for its innovative contributions to mobile communications and semiconductor solutions. The company specializes in designing and manufacturing advanced chipsets, wireless technology, and software solutions that enable seamless connectivity and intelligent devices. With a strong commitment to research and development, Qualcomm drives the digital transformation across various sectors, including mobile, automotive, IoT, and artificial intelligence. The organization fosters a dynamic and inclusive work environment that encourages innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning, making it an ideal place for talented professionals to grow and contribute to cutting\\-edge technological advancements.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Software Engineer to join our innovative Generative AI team at Qualcomm. In this role, you will be instrumental in developing and deploying advanced AI inference solutions on Qualcomm chipsets. Your primary responsibility will be to spearhead the development and commercialization of the Qualcomm AI Runtime (QAIRT) SDK, optimizing it for Qualcomm System on Chips (SoCs). This position offers an exciting opportunity to work at the forefront of AI technology, particularly in deploying large language models (LLMs), large vision models (LVMs), and other generative AI frameworks directly on edge devices. You will collaborate with cross\\-functional teams including hardware, architecture, and testing engineers to ensure the delivery of high\\-performance, power\\-efficient AI solutions that meet market demands and push the boundaries of what is possible in edge AI deployment.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a minimum of a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, with relevant professional experience. Candidates should have at least 6 years of experience in software development, with strong expertise in AI and machine learning frameworks. Proficiency in programming languages such as C, C\\+\\+, and Python is essential. A deep understanding of generative AI models—including LLMs, LVMs, transformers, and their building blocks—is required. Familiarity with hardware acceleration techniques, including optimization for CPU, GPU, and NPU architectures, is highly desirable. Knowledge of quantization, floating\\-point and fixed\\-point representations, as well as experience with AI hardware accelerators, will be considered an asset. Candidates should demonstrate excellent analytical, debugging, and communication skills, along with the ability to work effectively in a globally diverse team environment.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a key member of the AI engineering team, your responsibilities will include leading the development and optimization of the Qualcomm AI Runtime (QAIRT) SDK for Qualcomm’s SoCs. You will focus on enhancing the performance of large models, deploying neural network frameworks efficiently, and ensuring that AI workloads run seamlessly on edge devices. Your role will involve designing and implementing high\\-performance C/C\\+\\+ software stacks, applying best practices in software engineering, and staying abreast of the latest advancements in GenAI. You will work closely with hardware teams to optimize algorithms for AI accelerators and contribute to the development of power\\-efficient inference engines capable of running large models at near GPU speeds. Additionally, you will support cross\\-functional collaboration, provide technical guidance, and contribute to the continuous improvement of AI deployment strategies on Qualcomm platforms.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Qualcomm offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support the well\\-being and professional growth of its employees. This includes competitive salary packages, health insurance, retirement plans, and paid time off. Employees have access to ongoing learning opportunities, professional development programs, and technological resources to enhance their skills. The company promotes a healthy work\\-life balance and provides a flexible work environment where possible. Qualcomm also encourages innovation and recognizes employee achievements through various incentive programs. Joining Qualcomm means becoming part of a forward\\-thinking organization committed to making a meaningful impact through technology and fostering a supportive, inclusive workplace culture.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Qualcomm is an equal opportunity employer committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. We welcome applications from individuals of all backgrounds, regardless of race, gender, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We are dedicated to providing reasonable accommodations throughout the hiring process for candidates with disabilities. Qualcomm ensures that all employees and applicants are treated fairly and with respect, fostering an environment where everyone can thrive and contribute to our shared success. If you require accommodations or additional support during the application process, please contact us through the provided channels. We believe that diversity drives innovation and are committed to supporting a workforce that reflects the communities we serve.
